scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n api,web -c blue,green "cargo run -p voyalier-server" "pnpm --filter @voyalier/web dev"
scripts.build: pnpm --filter @voyalier/contracts typecheck && pnpm --filter @voyalier/web build && pnpm --filter @voyalier/docs build
scripts.check: pnpm lint && pnpm typecheck && pnpm test && pnpm build
